summary: Comprehensive testing of PRaww Reads app (FastAPI+MongoDB backend + React frontend). Fixed 1 critical bug (comment 500 error). All 36 backend tests pass. All 10 critical frontend flows verified and working.

minor.issue: Trending stories aggregation pipeline does not populate author_name field - shows 'Unknown' on home page trending section. The /api/stories endpoint correctly enriches with author names but /api/stories/trending does not.

integration_issues.issue: Trending stories display 'by Unknown' for author name because /api/stories/trending doesn't join with users collection for author_name

issues: Author name shows 'by Unknown' due to missing author enrichment in trending stories API

bugs_fixed.description: POST /api/stories/{story_id}/comments returned 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId not being removed after insert_one(). Added comment.pop('_id', None) after insert_one call.

action_items: Fix GET /api/stories/trending endpoint to enrich stories with author_name (same as GET /api/stories) - currently shows 'by Unknown' on home page
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/stories/trending uses MongoDB aggregation pipeline but doesn't enrich stories with author_name. Fix: add a lookup stage or post-process like GET /api/stories does.
CORS config: allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per CORS spec, but works because frontend+backend are on same domain. May cause issues if ever separated.
JWT secret 'prawwreads-secret-key-2024' is only 26 bytes (below recommended 32 bytes for SHA256, produces InsecureKeyLengthWarning in logs). Consider setting a longer JWT_SECRET env var.
server.py is 675 lines - approaching the recommended 700 line limit. Consider splitting routes into separate files for maintainability.

test_credentials.user2: various test@praww.com variations created during backend tests

seed_data_creation: Created several test stories, books, and messages during testing. Some persisted (UI Test Story - The Great Adventure, messaging test books)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical features verified and working. One outstanding fix needed: GET /api/stories/trending needs to enrich author_name. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_praww_reads.py. The comment creation bug (ObjectId 500 error) was found and fixed. All frontend flows (login, register, profile, write story, like/favorite/comment, marketplace, messaging, inbox) work correctly.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: MongoDB's insert_one() modifies the inserted dict IN PLACE by adding '_id' (ObjectId) field. When the comment dict was spread into the response object ({**comment, ...}), the ObjectId was included but is not JSON-serializable, causing FastAPI to throw ValueError.
rca_of_issue.fix: Added `comment.pop('_id', None)` after `await db.story_comments.insert_one(comment)` in the create_story_comment function.
rca_of_issue.similar_pattern: create_story and create_chapter already correctly call .pop('_id', None) after insert_one. create_book, register, and send_message also correctly handle this. Only create_story_comment was missing this step.
